title: Sanicula epipactis

Sanicula epipactis is often classified as a perennial herb, with a growth habit that typically reaches 15-30 centimeters in height. The plant is characterized by its dark green, lance-shaped leaves and its umbrella-like inflorescence. Sanicula epipactis is a member of the genus Sanicula, which consists of approximately 40 species of flowering plants.
